synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2791 Oracle Linux 9 libdnf bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2791
description:
[0.69.0-17.0.1]
- Recognise new kernel-uek RPMs as multiversion and installonlypkg [Orabug: 36053872]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Update OL9 dnf to recognize UEK7(kernel-uek-core & kernel-uek-modules) as installonlypkgs package [Orabug: 33861607]
- Replaced bugzilla.redhat.com with bugzilla.oracle.com in config [Orabug: 29656932]
- Add support for apps that use libdnf to access yum url with 'ociregion' variable [Orabug: 30121584]
- Update OL8 dnf to recognise kernel-uek as installonlypkgs package [Orabug: 31018668]
- Disable rhsm [Orabug: 29901202]

[0.69.0]
- Add OpenELA bugtracker

[0.69.0-17]
- Fix a crash when parsing multiple key files fails (RHEL-135601)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2791

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2791.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libdnf-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
libdnf-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
libdnf-devel-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
libdnf-devel-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
python3-hawkey-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
python3-libdnf-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libdnf-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
libdnf-devel-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
python3-hawkey-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
python3-libdnf-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libdnf-0.69.0-17.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.69.0-17.0.1]
- Recognise new kernel-uek RPMs as multiversion and installonlypkg [Orabug: 36053872]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Update OL9 dnf to recognize UEK7(kernel-uek-core & kernel-uek-modules) as installonlypkgs package [Orabug: 33861607]
- Replaced bugzilla.redhat.com with bugzilla.oracle.com in config [Orabug: 29656932]
- Add support for apps that use libdnf to access yum url with 'ociregion' variable [Orabug: 30121584]
- Update OL8 dnf to recognise kernel-uek as installonlypkgs package [Orabug: 31018668]
- Disable rhsm [Orabug: 29901202]

[0.69.0]
- Add OpenELA bugtracker

[0.69.0-17]
- Fix a crash when parsing multiple key files fails (RHEL-135601)
